description: Freya chunk registry for extendable LLM-style components.

chunks.title: Backend Health Doctor
chunks.description: Probe all configured model backends and return health + model inventory.

chunks.title: Model Routing Profile
chunks.description: Persist default backend/model profile for chunk workflows.

chunks.title: Telemetry Alert Gate
chunks.description: Run safety gates over telemetry rows and emit mission alert payload.

chunks.title: Telemetry Plot Export
chunks.description: Generate telemetry HTML charts from ingested rows.

chunks.title: Telemetry Stream Replay
chunks.description: Replay telemetry rows as live JSONL stream with configurable rate.

chunks.title: Quantum Preset Runner
chunks.description: Execute reusable quantum preset circuits (bell, ghz, grover2).

chunks.title: Quantum Algorithm Runner
chunks.description: Run algorithm adapters (grover demo, shor fallback).

chunks.title: GIS Coordinate Convert
chunks.description: Convert WGS84 coordinates to WebMercator/UTM routing outputs.

chunks.title: GIS HTML Map Export
chunks.description: Generate a lightweight HTML map artifact from GeoJSON.

chunks.title: Stats and Regression
chunks.description: Compute summary stats or linear regression from CSV datasets.

chunks.title: Diaspora Math Engine
chunks.description: Run abacus/lattice and broader diaspora-method calculations with step traces.

chunks.title: Finance Models
chunks.description: Run NPV and optional IRR approximations for cashflows.

chunks.title: Docker Build Adapter
chunks.description: Dry-run or run docker build commands from chunk workflows.

chunks.title: Cloud Upload Adapter
chunks.description: Provider-routed upload adapter to stage files in freya state.

chunks.title: Custom Agent Scaffold
chunks.description: Create draft agent manifests for domain-specific automation.

chunks.title: Live History Calculator
chunks.description: Build timeline-aware calculation events using diaspora math methods.

chunks.title: Custom Agent Inventory
chunks.description: List custom agent manifests available to the CLI.

chunks.title: Plugin Install Registry
chunks.description: Install/register plugin metadata in freya plugin registry.

chunks.title: Plugin Inventory
chunks.description: List installed plugin metadata.

chunks.title: Benchmark Runner
chunks.description: Benchmark a command across iterations and summarize latency.

chunks.title: Benchmark Comparator
chunks.description: Compare benchmark JSONL snapshots and compute drift/improvement.
